jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - CREDAI - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
CREDAI, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CREDAI:
CREDAI is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CREDAI!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
